title: What i am doing and how YOU could become a part of it!
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey everyone!

I am in development for some time right now in a full automated trading bot, using my own (used) strategy.  
I have re-engineered my strategy to be automation compatible.  
See my latest post on what my project is about!

So what is this post about?

I am currently growing my team to expand our reach on multiple platforms.  
To not only build bots, but also tools that'll help not only short-term traders, but also long-term investors and all in between.

No, not everyone will work on the bot.  
I have a vision to gather a team in which everyone has their own expertise. This to stay versatile as a whole.  
Creating a team who can work together, and all needing each other, with a common goal in mind.

For example:  
Right now i am working with my partner from the start on our main project, being the full automated bot.  
But in the same time, someone else on the team is working on a brand new website for us, with a built in  screener that'll function to improve our bots functions even more, and also be available for our community members.

I currently have 3 roles available on the team, maybe more coming in the future.  
  
DEVELOPER - To help develop various tools and bots, on various platforms (MT4/5 - CTRADER - TRADINGVIEW)

MODERATOR - To guide people through our server, and help keep it clean and safe for all.

ANALYST - People who will help engineer, discover and think on new projects, to improve projects and to test functions of all our work.

Teamwork makes the dream work.  
Why be competitive in a sector in which billions go around each day when we can work together with a common vision, being extracting money for ourselves in the complex financial markets with the brilliant help of automation.

Thanks for reading :)

comments.author: Comfortable-Friend96
comments.body:
I'm a dev with a bachelor and 10 years of trading experience.
Depending on the context and the situation, i might be interested

replies.author: No_Page5992
replies.body:
Hey!
Thank you very much for your reply!
I will message you privately for further discussion to see if we both fit in each others picture!
